description:
The file '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety.csv' is already open in Jamovi. Perform a Pearson Partial Correlation analysis between 'Exam' (exam score) and 'Anxiety' (exam anxiety), controlling for 'Revise' (hours spent revising). Save the project as '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety_PartialCorr.omv' and create a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/partial_correlation_report.txt' containing exactly three lines with the results:
Partial r: [value]
P-value: [value]
Significant: [Yes/No]
